title: caladenia clavula
intro: Caladenia clavula, commonly known as the clubbed spider orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the eastern regions of Australia, where it grows in a variety of habitats, including forests and grasslands. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. Herbal preparations of Caladenia clavula are often made into teas or infusions, which are said to provide health benefits such as improved digestion and reduced inflammation.
